questionHtml: Outline a method that could have been used in this study to measure the numbers of sea urchins per 0.25 m2.
markschemeHtml:
a. with quadrats (of 0.5 m side / 0.25m2);

b. (quadrats) position determined at fixed distance by transects
OR
(quadrats) position determined at random;

c. random sampling / capture-recapture;

d. average number calculated;

meta.title: Outline a method that could have been used in this study to measure the numbers of sea urchins per 0.25 m2.
breadcrumbLabels: C4.1.3. Random quadrat sampling to estimate population size for sessile organisms
